name: codersteroids
description: Coding-agent methodology with Context7 research, living roadmaps, Markdown wiki memory, release checks, and benchmark discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Context7-backed planning, roadmap, verification, LLM Wiki memory, and release readiness for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: CoderSteroids guides coding agents to research current documentation before using external APIs, keep a written roadmap and plan, maintain Markdown wiki memory, document folder responsibilities, package context for subagents, verify delegated work, export portable agent instructions, check host-enforcement surfaces, and benchmark against Superpowers before claiming superiority.
defaultPrompt: Continue from the roadmap and wiki memory.
